title: GRIEF SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: MT HOOD HOSPICE GRIEF SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides conversation and education groups designed to foster social connection, expand understanding, and develop coping skills for grieving a loss due to death. Groups are focused on grief and complicated circumstances such as substance use, abuse, mental health challenges, or strained relationships with the deceased. 39085 Pioneer Boulevard Suite 1018 Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Adults who have experienced the loss of an important person or are caring for a loved one with a terminal diagnosis Hours: Varies by group Email (503) 668-5545 , . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 668-5545 Laura Lirette, Bereavement Coordinator [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Caregiver/Care Receiver Support Groups General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
